message:
test(fcp-store): add structured JSON test logging infrastructure

Introduce comprehensive structured test logging across fcp-store modules
to enable machine-readable test output for CI/CD analysis and debugging.

## Test Logging Infrastructure

New StoreLogData struct captures test context:
- object_id: Content address being tested
- object_size: Size in bytes
- symbol_count: Number of erasure coding symbols
- coverage_bps: Coverage in basis points (0-10000)
- nodes_holding: List of nodes with symbols
- details: Additional JSON metadata

run_store_test() wrapper provides:
- Automatic timing measurement (microseconds)
- Panic catching with proper propagation
- JSON-formatted log output with timestamps
- Correlation IDs for distributed tracing
- Pass/fail assertion counts

## Module-Specific Changes

coverage.rs (+336 lines):
- Wrap all coverage tests in run_store_test()
- Log placement decisions and node distribution
- Track coverage evaluation metrics

symbol_store.rs (+188 lines):
- Convert async tests to sync with internal runtime
- Log symbol put/get operations
- Track object metadata and retrieval stats

object_store.rs (+170 lines):
- Add structured logging for object lifecycle
- Log storage decisions and retrieval paths

gc.rs:
- Minor formatting improvements

lib.rs:
- Export path adjustments

## Benchmark Updates (benches/symbol_store.rs)
- Improved formatting and organization
- Better metric collection structure

## Log Output Format
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-16T00:00:00Z",
  "level": "info",
  "test_name": "empty_distribution",
  "module": "fcp-store",
  "phase": "verify",
  "operation": "placement",
  "result": "pass",
  "duration_us": 42,
  "assertions": {"passed": 3, "failed": 0}
}
```

This infrastructure enables:
- Automated test result aggregation
- Performance regression detection
- Detailed failure analysis
- Integration with observability platforms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
